name: How to Pickle Cured Bacon
recipeIngredient: 100 pounds Bacon (sides from fresh killed country hogs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the sides of bacon on a board and lightly rub with fine salt.
2. Let stand for 48 hours.
3. In a large pot, mix the kosher salt, brown sugar, and salt peter thoroughly until dissolved in the spring water.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil and cook for 15 minutes, skimming any impurities.
5. Allow the liquid to cool before placing the bacon in a clean oak barrel.
6. Pour the cooled brine over the bacon, ensuring it is fully submerged.
7. Place a heavy weight on top of the bacon to keep it completely under the brine.
8. Store the barrel in a cool place for about one year. Smoke sections of bacon as needed.
Note: This recipe does not specify serving size or nutritional information.
